risk_title: Political and Governance Risk - High Rating Sustained
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as 'High' throughout project implementation, indicating persistent fragility in the political environment affecting project operations in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Province.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High High High

risk_summary: Incomplete transition of Citizen Facilitation Centers to provincial government control creates governance fragility risk. Only 22 of 43 CFCs have been transitioned, with remaining centers expected to transfer by February 2026. Lack of clear transition roadmap between Ministry of Economic Affairs and KP government indicates potential governance coordination challenges.
evidence_quote: On transition of the program to the Government of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP), they have already taken over 22 out of 43 CFCs, while the remaining CFCs are expected to be transitioned to KP by February 28, 2026. Ministry of Economic Affairs and the government of KP need to jointly develop and share a roadmap with the Bank that clearly depicts the transition and financing modality pre and post program transition.
